creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, Jun 16, 2009 at 09:31:39AM -0400, Michael Scheidell wrote:
> Not sure why it high priority   ill look again, but with  the problems
> of applying minor patches and fixes, no,  just close it.  Ill include
> fixes later in the next patch I submit. Grammar errors don't need the
> castle or regression testing and new pack builds.

OK, I agree it's not a high priority so I will close it and note that
you will include these in the next update to the port.

But for your own education this change would not require any regression
testing, a rebuild of the port or of the package. I would have simply
committed it to the ports tree and the next time the package is
scheduled to be built it will pick up those changes.

-- WXS
